assessment.note: She is absorbing ambiguity to shield her team, which signals both reduced day-to-day clarity and a mild wellbeing strain.

new_queue.label: Carrying ambiguity
new_queue.name: Carrying more ambiguity yourself — where is that showing up most right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific place the ambiguity is landing before moving to support.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What support would actually take friction out of the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Moves from concern to concrete support Elena can use immediately.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Designated closer that lands on immediate action and support.
